138 
MDCL_SRGCL_NSTRL_AMT 
LABEL: 
Medical/Surgical Non-Sterile Supplies Amount ($) 
DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for the medical/surgical non-sterile supplies related to 
the beneficiary's stay. 
SHORT NAME: MDCL_SRGCL_NSTRL_AMT 
LONG NAME: MDCL_SRGCL_NSTRL_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
MedPAR (derived) 
VALUES: 
—
